title: Ortho-Positronium Three-Photon Decays: Physics Constraints and a Closed-Form Energy Method for Annihilation Vertex Reconstruction
author_string: L. Raczyński, W. Krzemień, A. Coussat, M. Bała, B. C. Hiesmayr et al.
abstract: We examine the physical foundations of orthopositronium three-photon decay in the context of annihilation vertex reconstruction, focusing on how energy-momentum conservation constrains the space of physically admissible solutions. Finally, we provide a closed-form analytical derivation of an energy-based vertex reconstruction algorithm.
